title: Update hero image to AI illustration of Odisha state map with solar elements

requirements.summary: Generate a new AI illustration hero image depicting the Odisha state map overlaid with solar power elements and save it to the frontend assets directory
acceptanceCriteria: The image clearly depicts the recognizable outline/map of Odisha state
Solar power elements (panels, sun rays, energy lines) are visually prominent in the illustration
The image uses warm amber/orange/gold tones consistent with the app's solar theme

file_operations.description: Generate and save an AI illustration depicting the Odisha state map silhouette filled with solar panel patterns, glowing sun rays radiating outward, and energy grid lines overlaid on the map. Use warm amber, orange, and gold tones against a deep navy sky background. Dimensions: 1920x1080 pixels. The illustration should prominently feature the recognizable outline of Odisha state with integrated solar power visual elements (panels, sun rays, energy grid lines) to convey renewable energy and regional identity.

requirements.summary: Update the Hero component to display the newly generated Odisha solar map illustration as the full-screen background while preserving all existing hero content and functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays the new Odisha solar map illustration as its background
A semi-transparent overlay is applied so headline, tagline, and CTA buttons remain clearly legible
The image covers the full viewport width and height (object-cover or equivalent)
All existing hero content (headline, tagline, WhatsApp CTA, trust-stat cards) remains intact and visible

file_operations.description: Replace the existing hero background illustration with the newly generated Odisha solar map image located at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png. Update the background image reference to use this asset path. Ensure the image is displayed as a full-screen background with object-cover positioning and that the existing semi-transparent overlay remains applied so the headline, tagline, WhatsApp CTA button, scheme CTA button, and three trust-stat cards remain clearly legible. Do not modify any hero text, CTA functionality, or layout structure.
